text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We've attracted a number of new<n>supporters,
including our most vocal<n>critic. It turns out she has
emotions<n>she wants to convey to her fans as
well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The event we're planning will involve<n>over
100,000 people, a number that<n>sounds almost
impossible. But it's<n>beginning to feel more real by
the<n>day.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A call from the URA seals the deal—we<n>officially
have permission to hold the<n>Grand Concert. Now
to double down<n>and make our vision a reality!
